title: tpm — generate_a_weekly_exec_review_pptx_for_the_26ai_pr — v1
description: Synthesized by skill_builder for persona=tpm, kb=generate_a_weekly_exec_review_pptx_for_the_26ai_pr. Refine before promoting.

project_name.description: Extract the project/program name as written in the header/title area (e.g., '26ai'). Output only the name, without extra qualifiers unless they are part of the official title.

overall_rag.description: Extract the overall status as a single value: 'Green', 'Amber', or 'Red' (or the exact equivalent used in the source). If the source uses icons/colors, map them to the corresponding word and output only that word.

executive_summary.description: Capture the executive summary narrative intended for leadership: 2–5 concise sentences covering what changed this week, why it matters, and the current trajectory. Keep it exec-readable and avoid copying long bullet lists verbatim.

key_accomplishments.description: Extract the key accomplishments completed this week as a list of short bullets (strings), each starting with an action verb and including concrete deliverables or decisions. Keep each item to one line; exclude planned/future work.

upcoming_milestones.description: Extract upcoming milestones as a list where each item includes milestone name plus target date (if present) in the same string (e.g., 'Beta launch — 2026-06-01'). Include only forward-looking milestones not yet completed.

schedule_health.description: Extract schedule health as 'Green', 'Amber', or 'Red' (or the exact label used), plus a brief justification in the same string if provided (e.g., 'Amber — Beta slipped 2 weeks due to X'). If only a color/icon is shown, output just the status word.

scope_health.description: Extract scope health as 'Green', 'Amber', or 'Red' (or the exact label used), including any stated rationale such as scope changes, churn, or de-scopes. If only a color/icon is shown, output just the status word.

resource_health.description: Extract resource/people health as 'Green', 'Amber', or 'Red' (or the exact label used), including any noted staffing gaps, hiring needs, or bandwidth constraints. If only a color/icon is shown, output just the status word.

top_risks.description: Extract the top risks as a list of concise bullets; each item should include the risk statement and (if present) impact/likelihood or mitigation in the same line. Keep ordering as shown (highest priority first) and do not include resolved risks unless explicitly still tracked.

metrics_snapshot.description: Extract the metrics snapshot as a list of metric strings in 'Metric: value (trend/target if shown)' form (e.g., 'Latency p95: 220ms (↓10ms WoW)'). Include only metrics explicitly shown; do not compute derived values.

workstream_status.description: Extract per-workstream status as a list where each item contains 'Workstream — RAG — 1-line update' (use the exact workstream names and statuses shown). Preserve the order from the source and keep each update to a single concise sentence.
